# Incisiv Brand Guidelines — Agent Reference
# Version: 1.0 | April 2026
# Full guidelines: https://brand-guideline-three.vercel.app
# Download assets: https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/2dmazrwys3f3hqprc2fsa/AEXLm6HG_AJM8hOBTyqUFTA?rlkey=yz0f15sm1wdi98rwwla2v631m&st=z8y6j6ov&dl=0

Incisiv is a B2B retail technology intelligence company.

## Colors
- Black #000000 — primary, dominant (cover backgrounds, headlines, logo)
- Navy #131c4e — secondary workhorse (section headers, dark UI)
- Purple #7B2D8B — tertiary accent (headlines, emphasis; never large backgrounds)
- Dark Teal #14314D — tertiary accent (gradients, callout boxes)
- Orange #FA9628 — high-energy accent (CTAs only; max ONE per layout)
- Neutrals: Dark Gray #5b5b5b, Mid Gray #a0a0a0, Light Gray #e8e8e8, White #ffffff

## Gradients (3 approved)
- Nebula: linear-gradient(135deg, #131c4e 0%, #7B2D8B 100%)
- Deep Ocean: linear-gradient(135deg, #131c4e 0%, #14314D 100%)
- Midnight: linear-gradient(135deg, #000000 0%, #131c4e 100%)
- Rule: Never use gradients on body text

## Typography
- Headlines: Poppins (weights 300–800) — Google Fonts — EXCLUSIVE to headlines, display, callouts
- Body/UI: Libre Franklin (400, 500, 600, italic) — Google Fonts — all non-headline text
- Scale: H1 Poppins 700 40px / H2 Poppins 600 24px / H3 Poppins 500 18px / Body Franklin 400 16px / Caption Franklin 400 13px
- Never substitute either font

## Icons
- Library: Lucide Icons — https://lucide.dev/icons — MIT license
- CDN: https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest/dist/umd/lucide.min.js
- Style: Outline only, 1.5px stroke, rounded caps and joins — NEVER filled
- Always reference by exact Lucide name (e.g. bar-chart-2, map-pin, trending-up)

## Logo
- Primary lockup: logomark + logotype — DEFAULT for all materials
- Clearspace: minimum = logomark height on all four sides
- White logo on dark (black, navy); black logo on light (white, gray)
- Never stretch, rotate, recolor, add effects, or place in a badge

## Tone of Voice
- Adaptable, Purposeful, Collaborative, Future-Driven
- Authoritative in research, warm at events, energetic on social

## Social Media Dimensions
- LinkedIn: 1200 × 628px | Instagram: 1080 × 1080px | Twitter/X: 1600 × 900px
- Format: Stat cards — logo top-left, Poppins 800 stat, descriptor, footer
- Always dark background (navy/black), always white logo

## Machine-Readable Data
Full structured brand tokens (JSON) are embedded in the HTML at:
  <script type="application/json" id="incisiv-brand-data">
Parse with: JSON.parse(document.getElementById('incisiv-brand-data').textContent)
